text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days after the Arima Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations on winning the Best Senior
award!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much!

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
You've had a fantastic senior year with your
victories! We'd love to hear a few words from
you...

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text: But before that, we have a surprise guest!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the announcer's cue, a figure gallantly enters
the stage. It's none other than...

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text: Hello, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, isn't that a super famous actor?! Oh, I remember
now! She's Fuji Kiseki's mother!

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I thought it would be best to watch my daughter's
big moment unfold backstage, but...

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! I just couldn't resist! Seeing you surprised
never gets old!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But of course I'm surprised! You usually never
come onstage for things like this.

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, I'm not here to steal your spotlight.
There's just something I wanted to tell you. I'll
keep it short!

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
To tell you the truth, I was worried about you,
having me as a mother. You wanted to be me so
much when you were young.

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
But you aren't me. Even if you tried to walk the
same path as me, it would have been impossible
for you to obtain what you desired.

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
But despite my worries, you were able to choose
your own path and earn irreplaceable triumph and
respect for yourself.

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
My daughter, the pride you feel now is a treasure
beyond measure.

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
You must treasure it and never lose it.
Congratulations again, my love.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I will! And thank you, Mother!

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I must thank your trainer too! Thank you so much
for supporting my daughter. I'm counting on you
to keep watching over her.

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Thank you all for listening! And now, I must pass
the baton back to Fuji!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, everyone, for choosing me for this
award and the wonderful surprise!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And thank you so much for coming here despite
your busy schedule, Mother.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Like my mother said, my self-confidence has
become strong and pliant over these past three
years.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I was only capable of gaining this confidence
thanks to the support of my loved ones.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: And so, as a small gesture of thanks...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She makes a flourish and two flower bouquets
appear in her arms.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I'd like to gift these blue stars to you.
And for you, Mother, please take these red
geraniums. Thank you so much, both you!

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! Does this mean you knew I was coming
from the beginning?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Not at all! I just thought it would be nice if I could
give them to you, so I prepared this bouquet just
in case.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: It isn't too much, is it? Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Oh, to think you'd be the one surprising me. Since
when did you become so wily and wonderful,
dear?

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Geraniums, hm? They're lovely. Thank you for the
gift, Fuji.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I should be thanking you. Thank you both for
being there for me. I hope you'll continue to
support me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
On that note.. once more, thank you for this
award!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But don't go thinking things are over! There are
more miracles to be granted than there are stars
in the sky!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I hope you all stay tuned for my next one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki's award ceremony ends to the warm
sound of applause and cheers.
